sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81474" key="perikarfismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περικαρφισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (κάρφος</foreign>) <sense id="n81474.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covering oneself with chaff</tr_>, a practice of hens, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7o</biblScope> </bibl>od.</sense> </entryFree>
